qa_pairs.question: After submitting a Trillium Desktop job, where do you go?
qa_pairs.answer: After submitting a Trillium Desktop job, you will be taken to the 'My Interactive Sessions' page.

qa_pairs.question: What settings can you adjust to improve the performance of your Trillium Desktop session?
qa_pairs.answer: You can improve the performance and responsiveness of your Trillium Desktop session by lowering the 'Image Quality' and 'Image Compression' settings.

qa_pairs.question: When might you want to reduce the image quality and compression for a Trillium Desktop session?
qa_pairs.answer: You might want to reduce the image quality and compression if you have a slow internet connection, to improve the performance and responsiveness of the desktop.

qa_pairs.question: How do you launch the remote desktop environment once your Trillium Desktop job is running?
qa_pairs.answer: Once your Trillium Desktop job is running, click on the 'Connect to Trillium Desktop' button to launch the remote desktop environment in a new tab.
